latest.title: Building Production-Ready Agents with Kiro: Steering, Powers, Hooks, Specs, and Skills
latest.description: Learn how Kiro's five core features work together to give AI agents persistent context, on-demand tooling, and automated guardrails with a real-time fraud detection walkthrough for financial services.

latest.title: Breaking the Glass Ceiling of Low-Code: Migrating Automations to AWS
latest.description: Outgrowing low-code/no-code platforms? Learn how to migrate your workflows to AWS. We explore mapping webhooks and actions to API Gateway, Lambda, and Step Functions as an example.

latest.title: AWS PROJECT
latest.description: This shows the description on all the tasks I underwent

latest.title: How I built and configure EC2 instance with ubuntu vm, created IAM user, and created a billing alarm
latest.description: This is an article about my experience while working on my AWS cloud club unilorin bootcamp week 3 tasks where I talked about configuration of billing alert, IAM user creation, and running server on ubuntu server in my ec2 insatnce.

latest.title: OpenClaw on AWS Lightsail: Live Demo, Real Findings and the Security Gap No Framework Models Yet — Part 4
latest.description: Live demo closing a 4-part security series on OpenClaw deployed on AWS Lightsail. Real setup obstacles, 13 validated findings across IaaS and application layers, and prompt injection + memory poisoning tested against Claude Sonnet 4.6. Includes the security gap MITRE ATLAS and OWASP Top 10 for Agentic Applications 2026 don't cover yet: how IaaS configuration decisions activate or disable application-layer threat vectors.

latest.title: Building an Event-Driven, AI-Powered Driver Monitoring System on AWS with Amazon Bedrock
latest.description: Driver fatigue and distraction are among the leading causes of accidents in the logistics and transportation sectors. While traditional fleet management systems track vehicle location and speed, they often fail to monitor the most critical component: the driver’s real-time state.

latest.title: A SECURE BUILD: EC2 (Ubuntu) + IAM + Security + Billing
latest.description: From Zero to Deployed: Securing AWS with IAM, EC2, and Nginx on Ubuntu [AWS Cloud Club Unilorin Bootcamp 2026]

latest.title: Claude Code on EC2: Network Isolation for Regulated Environments
latest.description: How to deploy Claude Code on a shared Amazon EC2 instance with defense-in-depth security, per-user identity, and Amazon Bedrock — designed for healthcare, finance, and other regulated industries.

latest.title: Long Live MCP - the Dev Summit recap
latest.description: Running remote MCP servers on Lambda, Workers, or any horizontally-scaled runtime just got meaningfully easier. A field report of the latest MCP Dev Summit in NY for AWS builders.

latest.title: How to Install Kiro on Windows: From Download to Your First Agentic Interaction
latest.description: A practical, step-by-step guide for Windows developers installing both Kiro IDE and Kiro CLI. Covers the full flow from downloading  the installer to running your first agentic coding session in Windows Terminal, with Windows-specific gotchas around PATH  configuration, terminal choice, WSL, and proxy setup.

trending.title: Introducing Article View Counts on AWS Builder Center
trending.description: You can now see how many builders are reading your articles, giving you a real metric to understand the reach of your content.

trending.title: Cómo crear un agente de IA desde cero. Open source, local y gratis.
trending.description: De un modelo que solo responde a uno que busca, razona y recuerda. Todo con código que puedes leer, forkear y contribuir.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Ivy - The World's First Offline-Capable, Proactive AI Tutoring Agent
trending.description: A proactive AI tutoring agent powered by Amazon Bedrock that monitors student progress, initiates outbound voice calls, and runs on-device inference for offline learning addressing educational inequity for millions of Ethiopian students with intermittent connectivity.

trending.title: Investigate Azure Infrastructure Failures with AWS DevOps Agent
trending.description: Set up the AWS DevOps Agent integration with Azure using Outbound Identity Federation, introduce a PostgreSQL server failure, and trigger an autonomous cross-cloud investigation that identifies the root cause in minutes — with no stored credentials or agents in Azure.

trending.title: Construye con Strands Agents en Nerdearla Chile 2026
trending.description: Crea tu primer proyecto con Strands Agents en Nerdearla del 17 y 18 de Abril 2026 en Centro GAM, Santiago, Chile.

trending.title: Revolutionizing Email Productivity with AI-Powered Automation through CLI
trending.description: As a developer facing email overload, I built a solution for the Q Developer Challenge #1: email management. What began as a simple CLI tool grew into an AI-powered system that has transformed my workflow.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Caligo Dynamics - AI Powered Autonomous Drone Swarm for Emergency Response
trending.description: When a fire breaks out, firefighters often enter buildings blindly, unable to see victims, hazards, or even the way out. This project uses AI-powered drone swarms built with ROS2, PX4, Kiro, and Amazon Bedrock to detect fires, locate civilians, map dangerous environments, and help emergency teams contain fires before lives are lost.

trending.title: AWS Unilorin Project (Week 1–3): EC2 + IAM + Security + Billing
trending.description: This project showcases my practical implementation of IAM and EC2 services on AWS, including access control, server deployment, security configuration, billing monitoring, and permission validation through hands-on learning
